arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Connect queue.

description.description: A brief description of the Connect queue.

hours_of_operation_id.description: The ID that specifies the hours during which the queue is operational.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Connect queue.

max_contacts.description: The maximum number of contacts that can be handled by the queue at any given time.

name.description: The name assigned to the Connect queue.

outbound_caller_config.description: Configuration details for outbound calls made from the queue, including caller ID settings.

queue_id.description: The identifier of the queue within AWS Connect.

status.description: The current status of the Connect queue, such as active or inactive.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs assigned as tags to the Connect queue.
